mainText:
Feeling like you deserve it all? Bank of Entitlement has your back! "Why settle for less when you can have it all with Bank of Entitlement!"

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, picture this: I stroll into a fancy restaurant, oozing confidence in my designer suit, ready to dine like the king I am. The maitre d' greets me with a warm smile, recognizing my VIP status as a regular. I confidently announce, "I demand the best table in the house, overlooking the city skyline."As I sip on my expensive champagne, relishing the view, a waiter accidentally spills a drop on my pristine suit. Now, most people would brush it off, but not me-oh no. I dramatically stand up, causing a scene, and demand to see the manager. "This is an outrage!" I exclaim, as all eyes turn towards me.The manager rushes over, apologizing profusely, offering to cover the dry cleaning bill and a free meal. But that's not enough for Hot Josh. I demand a full refund for the meal, a gift card for future visits, and a handwritten apology from the chef. "I will not stand for such disrespect!" I proclaim, feeling a rush of entitlement coursing through my veins.In the end, I walk out of the restaurant, head held high, knowing that my sense of entitlement has once again prevailed. After all, why settle for less when you can have it all? Ah, the sweet taste of victory.
